
job CalcHash(make key(integer)) (integer) start
    make mp(integer) = 9128902657;
    make ml(integer) = 65553;
    make md(integer) = 3298534884403;
    return mod(mult(xor(key, mp), ml), md);
finish

create Hashmap start

    make buckets(vector(vector(pair(integer, integer))));
    make alpha(real(30));
    make SIZE(integer);

finish

job InitiateHashmap() (Hashmap) start
    make result(Hashmap);
    make it(integer) = 0;
    loop(lt(it, 4)) start
        make curr(vector(integer));
        append(get(result, buckets), curr);
        it = add(it, 1);
    finish
    get(result, alpha) = 0.0;
    get(result, SIZE) = 0;
    return result;
finish

job Size(make map(Hashmap)) (integer) start
    return get(map, SIZE);
finish

job Insert(make map(Hashmap), make key(integer), make val(integer)) start
    get(map, SIZE) = add(get(map, SIZE), 1);
    get(map, alpha) = div(get(map, SIZE), len(get(map, buckets)));
    if (or(lt(get(map, alpha), 3.0), eq(get(map, alpha), 3.0))) start
        make hash_value(integer) = call(CalcHash, key);
        make pos(integer) = mod(hash_value, len(get(map, buckets)));
        make it(integer) = 0;
        loop(lt(it, len(at(get(map, buckets), pos)))) start
            if (eq(first(at(at(get(map, buckets), pos), it)), key)) start
                second(at(at(get(map, buckets), pos), it)) = val;
            finish
            it = add(it, 1);
        finish
    finish else start

    finish
finish

job Exists(make map(Hashmap), make key(integer)) (bool) start
    make hash_value(integer) = call(CalcHash, key);
    make pos(integer) = mod(hash_value, len(get(map, buckets)));
    make it(integer) = 0;
    loop(lt(it, len(at(get(map, buckets), pos)))) start
        if (eq(key, at(at(get(map, buckets), pos), it))) start
            return true;
        finish
        it = add(it, 1);
    finish
    return false;
finish

job GetValue(make map(Hashmap), make key(integer)) (integer) start

finish
